title: Outline Item Type
description: Type definition for outline items used by the ACoreX outline navigation system. This type represents the structure of individual navigation items within an outline container.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the outline item. This is used for navigation and URL fragment generation.

props.name: el
props.description: The DOM element that represents this outline item in the document.

props.name: active
props.description: Whether this outline item is currently active (visible in the viewport or at the scroll position).

props.name: scrollY
props.description: The vertical scroll position of this outline item relative to the container.

props.name: parentId
props.description: Optional parent identifier for hierarchical outline structures. Used to create nested navigation menus.

props.name: hasAnchor
props.description: Whether this outline item has an anchor link (hash link) for direct URL navigation.
